Hey guys, I'm going to talk about EFA. Okay, one, how much should I take? One serving a day, every day. Again, when? Take this with your multivitamin. Chances are you take your multivitamin in the morning, just take it with that. This does contain fat-soluble vitamins, so combining all your vitamins together, not a bad idea. Makes it super simple. How should you take it? Should you take it with food or liquid? This does contain calories because there are fats like, you know, a couple of calories. So the ingredients that need food to be absorbed are absorbed in the oil already, so that's good. Liquid, just as much liquid as you need to swallow your capsules. Do you have to cycle this? Absolutely not. Take it every day. This stuff is damn good for you. So don't ever stop taking things that are good for you. Okay. Lastly, what happens if you skip? You can absolutely double up. No issues there. Pretty straightforward.
